title: 12 homes destroyed in Mossel Bay fires
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  While there is no...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  While there is no estimate on the cost of damages caused by the Mossel Bay wildfires between 5 and 10 January, it has been confirmed that a total of 12 houses were destroyed.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - While there is no estimate on the cost of damages caused by the Mossel Bay wildfires between 5 and 10 January, it has been confirmed that a total of 12 houses were destroyed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality said 11 houses in Vakansieplaas (Vogelsang Estate) and one in Island View were ravaged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No municipal infrastructure was damaged, but the municipality could not comment on the estimated damage to private properties.","html":"No municipal infrastructure was damaged, but the municipality could not comment on the estimated damage to private properties."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cause of the fire remains unknown.","html":"The cause of the fire remains unknown."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality added that it is not allowed to do work on private property, therefore any rehabilitation, if required, is not a municipal responsibility and should be undertaken by the respective property owners.","html":"The municipality added that it is not allowed to do work on private property, therefore any rehabilitation, if required, is not a municipal responsibility and should be undertaken by the respective property owners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Island View, Vakansieplaas, Aalwyndal residents being evacuated","Animals rescued as Mossel Bay fire rages","MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Gift of the Givers supports Mossel Bay fire response","MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Fire largely contained","MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Firefighting efforts challenged by strong winds","MOSSEL BAY FIRE: Crews remain fully deployed","MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Mop up, monitoring continues, but no more active fires","MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Crew to remain, patrol and monitor affected areas - 11 January","VIDEO: Aftermath of Mossel Bay fires as seen from the air"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
